title: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea's blockchain securities system
message_html: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea's blockchain securities system ...
snippet: The Korea Securities Depository platform is expected to launch by February 2027, aligning with South Korea’s incoming security token regulations.

title: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal
message_html: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal ...
snippet: Bithumb’s tie-up with SSI Digital positions it for Vietnam’s strict crypto exchange pilot as competition for scarce licenses heats up and scrutiny mounts at home.
